fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. The store persists became_actionable_at and last_blocker_progress_at or equivalent indexed workflow facts without requiring per-query history scans. 2. Workflow facts update incrementally on ticket state changes and depends_on edge mutations across only the affected reverse-dependency slice. 3. Large graph queries use indexed workflow facts and graph adjacency rather than full-store rescans wherever practical. 4. Focused tests cover actionable transitions, blocker progress propagation, and index-backed query behavior.
fields.title: [ticket-api] Materialize recent-unblock and blocker-progress facts
